title: A Captain’s Hard Truth
description: On pages 9–12, this part focuses on a captain’s hard truth, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: A Captain’s Hard Truth. Luffy refuses to let Vivi carry the country alone, forcing her to face what it will actually take to stop Crocodile. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: W-Where am I...?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: I'm... under- water?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What is this, a fish tank?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: GRR...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's a... BANANA- Dile!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That damned idiot...!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Killing him once isn't enough!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: In any case, I want you all to etch these 5's faces into your brains!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Their objective is to stop the rebellion! They'll definitely show up in the middle of the action even if we don't look for them!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: But Zero...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Even if the princess were free to do as she wanted,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Do you really think one little girl can stop the rebels?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: It's complicated... My intelligence tells me that princess Nefertari Vivi,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Even if she can't stop the swarm of 700,000 rebels,

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: There's a good chance she'll cause the rebels to hesitate...

dialogue.speaker: Toto
dialogue.text: We can't afford to let those two meet...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Many of our Billions have already infiltrated the rebel forces.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The fact that I haven't received any updates from them yet means that Vivi and the Straw-Eat pirates have yet to take decisive action...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: We have to ensure it stays that way by keeping Vivi away from the rebles!

dialogue.speaker: Miss All Sunday
dialogue.text: Miss Miss All Sunday.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes?

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: I don't care if you have to use a dender-mushi. Just get the word out to the Billions stationed in Nanchohana as soon as you can,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: That they are to kill Vivi and the Straw-Eat pirates on sight!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: They cannot be allowed to enter Katorea no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: and most import-tantly, VIVI cannot be allowed to meet Kouza!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: As you wish...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Now get going, the rest of you,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Or our "celebra- tions" will be delayed...

dialogue.speaker: Crocodile
dialogue.text: Our Utopia awaits just ahead!

dialogue.speaker: Koza
dialogue.text: And I hope for your sakes that you won't cause me any trouble unlike a certain someone...

dialogue.speaker: Baroque Works agent
dialogue.text: BLUB

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can count on us, boss...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: QWe'll bring you success no matter what!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Good. Then enjoy yourselves...

summary: This part develops a captain’s hard truth and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
